title: Dungeon Walker
description: First-person raycasting dungeon — collect 6 gems then find the glowing exit across 3 themes.
concept: A retro Wolfenstein-style raycasting engine rendered in a pixel buffer. Procedural recursive-backtracking mazes vary each run. Three visual themes (Stone Castle, Cyber Temple, Ice Cave) swap procedural textures, fog colour, and sprite palettes. Collect all six floating gems to unlock the exit door, racing against the clock.
features: DDA raycasting with textured walls and depth fog
Procedural maze generation (recursive backtracking + loop carving)
6 collectable gems + exit door billboard sprites
WASD + mouse look + full mobile D-pad + drag look

interaction.keyboard: WASD move, Q/E strafe, mouse drag look, M minimap, Esc menu
interaction.mouse: click+drag on canvas to look, menu buttons
